message:
fix: clean up IsResolvedAgentClaude godoc and add nil guard

The PR #2408 placed the new exported function doc comment above the
existing isClaudeAgent comment, creating a confusing merged block.
Separate the comments so each function has its own clean godoc. Add nil
guard to IsResolvedAgentClaude to prevent panic if ResolveRoleAgentConfig
ever returns nil.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
